tasks.instruction: Read the text below. Fill in each gap (1.1-1.6) with one word to make the text correct.
tasks.text:
Welcome to my bedroom! It is not very big, but I like it a lot. 1.1. _________ is a comfortable bed next to the wall and there are two pillows 1.2. _________ it. My desk is 1.3. _________ front of the window, and there is a lamp on the desk so I can read at night.

There 1.4. _________ some books on the shelf above my bed. I also have a big poster of a dinosaur 1.5. _________ the wall. My cat likes to sleep 1.6. _________ the bed because it is warm and dark there.
